description: Inventory of adapter status values currently in use across PULSE v3 adapters

adapters.name: github
adapters.notes: Returns PulseSignal[] directly. No status field. Status managed by orchestrator.

adapters.name: github_actions
adapters.notes: Returns PulseSignal[] directly. No status field. Status managed by orchestrator.

adapters.name: sentry
adapters.notes: Returns PulseSignal[] directly. No status field. Status managed by orchestrator.

adapters.name: datadog
adapters.notes: Returns PulseSignal[] directly. No status field. Status managed by orchestrator.

adapters.name: prometheus
adapters.notes: Returns PulseSignal[] directly. No status field. Status managed by orchestrator.

adapters.name: codecov
adapters.notes: Returns PulseSignal[] directly. No status field. Status managed by orchestrator.

adapters.name: dependabot
adapters.notes: Returns PulseSignal[] directly. No status field. Status managed by orchestrator.

adapters.name: orchestrator
adapters.notes: Master orchestrator assigns status to each adapter after calling it. Pattern: ready (success), not_available (config missing), invalid (exception thrown).
adapters.usagePattern: Lines ~211, 224, 234 (GitHub); Lines ~255, 268, 278 (Sentry); Lines ~300, 313, 323 (GitHub Actions); same pattern repeated for each adapter
recommendations: stale: When adapter data is older than staleness threshold (e.g., >1h)
optional_not_configured: Explicitly distinguish optional adapters (e.g., Datadog, Prometheus) from required ones

refactorScope.phase4Focus: Type definition + inventory only (no adapter rewrite)
refactorScope.futurePhaseOutcome: Each adapter will be rewritten to explicitly use AdapterStatus type guard; orchestrator will assign from complete set of 5 values
